evaluator_feedback: Baseline artifacts and memo are complete, correctly transcribe packet values, and apply the stated decision logic and remediation deltas. Grader and verifier reached a passing conclusion (final_score 1.0). Remaining verification gaps are procedural/auditability items: (1) inability to programmatically open and validate live formulas in proton_robustness.xlsx (openpyxl/xlsxwriter unavailable), (2) truncated/malformed snippet in the memo preview (unmatched quote at the end of the decision table), (3) the memo documents assumed sensitivity perturbations (+/-1% coverage, +/-1 mm gap) that were not specified by the original task and should be explicitly justified or parameterized, and (4) no explicit tie-break policy for equality-at-threshold cases (e.g., coverage == 97%). These are low-to-medium severity and can be resolved with focused, low-risk revisions to improve auditability and verifier confidence.
